markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 10
#### Article 46. Unif. Vehicle Certificate of Title Act
##### § 2110 — Registration without certificate of title

If the commissioner is not satisfied as to the ownership of the vehicle or that there are no undisclosed security interests in it, the commissioner may register the vehicle but shall withold issuance of a certificate of title until the applicant presents documents reasonably sufficient to satisfy the commissioner as to the applicant’s ownership of the vehicle and that there are no undisclosed security interests in it.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
